overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game, showing a warrior character exploring a rugged coastal mountain landscape under overcast skies. The character walks through rocky terrain, passes a wooden watchtower, and traverses cliff edges with expansive ocean views.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky highland path with ancient stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through rocky terrain toward a wooden watchtower in the distance

entered.detail: moss-covered gray rocks and boulders covering the ground
distant mountain range with snow visible on the peaks under cloudy skies
ancient weathered stone wall remains scattered on the hillside
tall wooden observation tower with a ladder leading to the platform

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky highland landscape with distant snow-capped mountains visible under an overcast sky. The character walks forward along a dirt trail through ancient stone ruins, approaching a wooden watchtower that stands prominently on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff approach with ocean views opening up

events.description: character climbs down a rocky ledge, transitioning to lower elevation
ocean comes into view as character reaches the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: carefully climbs down a rocky ledge and continues along the cliff edge as the ocean panorama reveals itself

entered.detail: vast blue sea stretching to the horizon beyond the coastal cliffs
steep rocky cliffs dropping down to the ocean water

segments.scene_description: The character descends a rocky ledge and emerges onto a coastal cliff path. The wooden watchtower falls behind as the vast ocean comes into view on the left, with steep cliffs dropping to the water below. The terrain shifts to gravel as the character walks along the cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path with panoramic ocean views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cliff edge with expansive ocean views to the left

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the coastal cliff path with the ocean now prominently visible on the left side. The cliffs drop steeply to the water below as the character navigates the rocky gravel terrain, with distant rock formations visible in the misty horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed rocky ravine between tall boulders

events.description: terrain becomes more enclosed with taller rock formations creating a narrow passage

agents.ego_description: navigating through a darker, more enclosed rocky path between large boulders and rock walls

entered.detail: tall dark rock walls and boulders creating a narrow ravine passage

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a more enclosed rocky ravine with tall boulders on either side. The sky becomes partially obscured by the rock formations as the character moves through the narrower passage, with the ocean now visible only in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate highland ruin toward a sweeping coastal precipice. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail through ancient stone ruins, with distant snow-capped mountains looming under an overcast sky. As the character approaches and passes a prominent wooden watchtower on the horizon, the path leads downward over a rocky ledge. The scene then opens up as the character emerges onto a gravel cliff path, leaving the tower behind while the vast ocean reveals itself to the left. Finally, the terrain shifts to a narrow edge where steep cliffs drop sharply toward the water below.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged coastline that gradually transitions from an open cliffside into a confined rocky ravine. It begins with the character navigating a gravel path where the ocean is prominently visible to the left, stretching toward distant rock formations on a misty horizon. As the character moves forward, the wide vistas of the steep cliffs begin to narrow, and the open sky is slowly obscured by towering boulders. The scene then shifts into a tight passage where the surrounding rock walls close in on either side, finally leaving the ocean as a distant backdrop in the background.
